LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE AUG-08-2022 HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A.'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF'S UNOPPOSED MOTION GRANTED. THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH STATES THAT THE MOTION WAS UNOPPOSED. JUDGE: RICHARD B. calendar.matters:
MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Aug-08-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A.'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion to set aside and vacate default and default judgment" is granted.

The prevailing party is required to prepare and submit a proposed order which states that the motion was unopposed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
